name: Sayedna Hazrat Usman Bin Affan R.Z
about: He was the third caliph of the Rashidun Caliphate, ruling from 644 until his assassination in 656. Uthman, a second cousin, son-in-law, and senior companion of the Islamic prophet Muhammad, played a major role in early Islamic history. During his reign as caliph, he was known for ordering the official compilation of the standardized version of the Quran, known as the Uthmanic codex, which is still used today.

spouse.name: Bibi Umm Amr R.Z
spouse.about: Bibi Umm Amr R.Z was one of the wives of Hazrat Usman Bin Affan R.Z. She was known for her piety and devotion to Islam. Like her husband, she is also buried in Jannat al-Baqi cemetery in Medina, Saudi Arabia.

children.name: Hazrat Ameer Amr R.Z
children.about: Abu Uthman Amr ibn Uthman ibn Affan al-Umawi (Arabic: أَبُو عُثْمَانُ عَمْرِو بْنُ عُثْمَانُ بْنُ عَفَّان الأُمَوِيّ, romanized: Abū ʿUthmān ʿAmr ibn ʿUthmān ibn ʿAffān al-Umawī) was a son of Caliph Uthman and played political and military roles during the caliphates of Mu'awiya I (r.661-680), Yazid I (r.680-683) and Marwan I (684-685).

spouse.name: Bibi Hafsah Bint Abdullah R.Z
spouse.fname: Hazrat Abdullah bin Hazrat Umar Farooq
spouse.about: Bibi Hafsah Bint Abdullah R.Z was one of the wives of Hazrat Usman Bin Affan R.Z. She was known for her piety and devotion to Islam. Like her husband, she is also buried in Jannat al-Baqi cemetery in Medina, Saudi Arabia.

children.name: Hazrat Abdullah Kabeer R.H
children.about: He got married with Hazrat Bibi Fatima bint Imam Hussain R.Z. She had three children: Hazrat Mohammad Akbar, hazrat Umar and Hazrat Sa'ad R.Z

children.name: Hazrat Khwaja Abdul Azeez Surkhusi R.H
Hazrat Khwaja Abdur Rahman Gawzarooni R.H
children.about: He came to India with Sultan Mahmood Ghaznavi. Mahmood Ghaznavi occupied the city Lahore in 1021 CE and made Khawaja Abdur Rahman Gawzarooni R.H as the governor of Panipat.

children.name: Hazrat Khwaja Muhammad Jalaluddin Kabeer-ul-Aulia R.H
children.about: He was mureed and Khaleefa of Sayedna Shamsuddin Turk R.H. He was famous sufi saint of Silsila Chishtiya Sabriya. He got burried in Panipat and city Jalalabad was named after him.

children.name: Hazrat Khwaja Ishaaq Firdausi R.H
children.about: He was Mureed and Khaleefa of Makhdoom Shah Shoaib, Shekhpoora. He got burried in Baiganabad.

children.name: Hazrat Khwaja Barkhurdaar Firdausi R.H
children.about: He got burried in Baiganabad, Bihar, India.

children.name: Hazrat Makhdoom Shah Burhanuddin R.H
children.about: Otherwise known as Khoond Miyan Deoravi. He got settled in Osaas-Deora, Bihar and established Khanqah Burhaniya. He was Mureed and Khaleefa of Hazrat Ishaaq Firdausi R.H. He got burried in Osaas-Deora, Bihar.

spouse.name: Hazrat Bibi Auliya R.H
spouse.fname: hazrat Makhdoom Shah Darwesh Beethwi R.H
spouse.about: She was the daughter of Hazrat Makhdoom Shah Darwesh Beethwi R.H. Makhdoom Shah Darwesh is descendant of sister of Hazrat Syed Ashraf Jahangeer Samnani R.H. Shah Mansoor Danishmand R.H is her son

spouse.name: Not Known
spouse.about: She is other wife of Hazrat Makhdoom Shah Burhanuddin R.H. She had two sons: Shah Jamal and Shah Noor.

children.name: Hazrat Shah Mansoor Danishmand R.H
children.about: He was the second Sajjada of Khanqah Burhaniya, Deora. He got burried in Deora, Bihar, India.

children.name: Hazrat Shah Maroof Deoravi R.H
children.about: He is the third Sajjada of Khanqah Burhaniya, Deora. He got burried in Deora, Bihar, India.

spouse.name: Hazrat Bibi Zakka R.H
spouse.fname: Hazrat Shah Ghulam Ali Dewravi R.H
spouse.about: She is the daughter of Hazrat Shah Ghulam Ali Dewravi, who's the 6th Sajjada of Khanqah Burhaniya, Deora. She is the wife of Hazrat Shah Jaarullah R.H.

children.name: Hazrat Shah Ghulam Imaam R.H

children.about: Her descnedants are settled in Kara, Bihar, India.

children.name: Hazrat Shah Mujeeb-ul-Haq Kamaali Firdausi R.H
children.about:
He was the sajjada of khanqah Firdausiya, Simla. He got burried in Simla, Aurangabad, Bihar, India. He was a great poet also. One of his famous couplet is: 
Hai Kharabaye Baadaye Saaqi Kamali Ki dua,
 Hashr Tak ya Bul Hasan Aabad Maikhana rahe.

children.name: Hazrat Shah Muhammad Qasim Firdausi R.H

He was the sajjada of khanqah Firdausiya, Simla. He got burried in Simla, Aurangabad, Bihar, India. He was a great poet also. One of his famous couplet is: 
Hai Kharabaye Baadaye Saaqi Kamali Ki dua,
 Hashr Tak ya Bul Hasan Aabad Maikhana rahe.
